about.heading: About Me
about.body: I'm a newly graduated Full Stack & AI Engineer passionate about building end-to-end intelligent systems. I specialize in Python/FastAPI backends, Next.js frontends, and integrating large language models into real-world products. Currently open to freelance projects and full-time opportunities.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
